findings.title: Pre-pass reported zero deterministic structure or capability issues
findings.detail: structure-capabilities-prepass.json status is pass with an empty issues array: required H2 sections present, frontmatter name/description valid, no template artifacts, no directness-pattern hits in SKILL.md, memory path extraction consistent, and no top-level prompt .md files triggered config-header/progression checks.

findings.title: Description uses two-part summary plus conservative quoted triggers
findings.detail: Frontmatter description leads with a concrete capability summary ('Systematic quality validation for all production outputs') and a Use-when clause with quoted phrases ('talk to Quinn-R', 'Quality Guardian', 'quality review') plus explicit Marcus delegation, which supports reliable activation and distinguishes this agent from generic QA skills.

findings.title: Identity is actionable and aligned with declared dimensions
findings.detail: The one-sentence persona frames expertise (educational artifacts, medical-ed context), independence from content creation, constructive feedback, and calibration with the human reviewer—matching the five review dimensions and delegation model in Overview and Capabilities.

findings.title: Communication style includes concrete, persona-appropriate examples
findings.detail: Bullets specify severity semantics, location granularity (slide vs script examples), actionable suggestion shape, report organization by dimension, score summaries, and calibration transparency—consistent with a meticulous QA guardian coordinating with Marcus.

findings.title: Principles are domain-specific decision frameworks
findings.detail: Principles tie severity to accessibility, brand, alignment, actionability, pattern reporting, calibration, medical flagging vs adjudication, mode behavior, independence, and tone—avoiding generic platitudes and giving clear precedence rules.

findings.title: Headless delegation path is documented end-to-end
findings.detail: On Activation defines inputs (artifact paths, run id, specialist, content type, mode), required reads (style bible, course_context, tool_policies), quality-control automation via review-protocol, judgment review, feedback-format output, logging behavior, and return to Marcus.

findings.title: Sidecar memory specifies boundaries, modes, and save triggers
findings.detail: memory-system.md documents index/access-boundaries/patterns/chronology roles, read/write/deny zones, ad-hoc vs default write rules, explicit save triggers, and coordination with save-memory.md—consistent with SKILL.md activation instructions.

findings.title: Optional: quote 'quality gate validation' in the description trigger clause
findings.detail: Sibling trigger phrases use single quotes; 'quality gate validation' appears unquoted. Adding quotes would match the documented pattern and slightly tighten matching for Marcus-delegation wording.
findings.action: Change the description to wrap 'quality gate validation' in single quotes alongside the other trigger phrases, if you want maximum consistency with the two-part trigger style.

summary.assessment: Deterministic pre-pass is clean. The agent shows strong structural integrity: complete required sections, coherent identity and style, actionable principles, verified capability routes, and full headless plus sidecar memory documentation. Only a minor optional frontmatter consistency tweak was noted.
